skill.name: seo-content-writer
skill.description: Creates SEO-focused article packages from topics, keywords, and content briefs, including outlines, drafts, titles, metadata, summaries, links, and FAQs.
skill.summary: Drafts search-optimized content packages with outlines, metadata, FAQs, and practical quality checks.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported one external command pattern and two weak cryptography patterns, but all three are false positives in context. No evidence found of command execution, cryptographic code, network access, credential handling, data exfiltration, or prompt injection.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern
low_findings.description: The flagged text at SKILL.md line 3 is a YAML description for SEO content writing. No evidence found of weak cryptographic algorithms or cryptographic operations.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line contains only descriptive skill metadata about SEO content. There is no code path, algorithm name, or security-sensitive operation.

low_findings.title: False Positive: External Command Pattern
low_findings.description: The flagged text at SKILL.md line 25 uses Markdown backticks around a local documentation path. It does not execute Ruby, shell commands, scripts, or user-controlled input.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The backticks are Markdown formatting, and the instruction is to open a local resource path. No shell syntax or executable command is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern
low_findings.description: The flagged text at SKILL.md line 76 says to create a meta description. No evidence found of MD5, SHA-1, DES, or other weak cryptographic use.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The phrase refers to SEO page metadata, not cryptography. The surrounding section describes content deliverables, not code or data security.

content.value_statement: Content teams need structured articles that satisfy search intent and readers. This skill turns topics and keywords into outlines, drafts, metadata, and FAQs.
actual_capabilities: Builds article outlines from topics and target keywords.
Writes introductions, body sections, conclusions, and calls to action.
Suggests three to five title variations for a content package.
Creates meta descriptions with a 150 to 160 character target.
Adds key takeaways, internal linking ideas, and FAQs when relevant.
Applies readability, keyword density, and E-E-A-T quality guidance.
limitations: Does not perform live keyword research or search volume analysis by itself.
Requires user-provided topics, keywords, audience details, or briefs for best results.
Cannot verify factual claims unless sources or browsing tools are provided.
Does not publish content or update a website directly.

use_cases.title: Plan a Blog Article
use_cases.description: Turn a topic, keyword list, and audience goal into a structured article outline.

use_cases.title: Draft SEO Website Copy
use_cases.description: Create readable page content with titles, metadata, headings, and calls to action.

use_cases.title: Standardize Content Deliverables
use_cases.description: Generate repeatable content packages with summaries, FAQs, and linking suggestions.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic Outline
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this skill to create an SEO outline for [topic]. Target keyword: [keyword]. Audience: [audience]. Goal: [goal].

prompt_templates.title: Write a Complete Draft
prompt_templates.scenario: Writer needs a structured article package.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this skill to write a [word count] article about [topic]. Include the primary keyword [keyword], related terms [terms], title options, meta description, takeaways, and FAQ.

prompt_templates.title: Improve an Existing Draft
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this skill to revise this draft for SEO and readability. Improve headings, keyword placement, introduction, conclusion, internal link ideas, and E-E-A-T signals: [draft].

prompt_templates.title: Build a Content Package
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced user needs a publish-ready brief and draft.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this skill to create a full SEO content package for [topic]. Include search intent, outline, draft, title variations, meta description, FAQs, internal links, and quality checks.

output_examples.input: Topic: email marketing for local restaurants. Keyword: restaurant email marketing.
output_examples.output: A content package with title options, a search-focused outline, an introduction, section drafts, a concise meta description, key takeaways, internal link ideas, and FAQ prompts.

output_examples.input: Draft: a short product page for accounting software. Goal: improve SEO and conversion.
output_examples.output: A revised page structure with clearer headings, natural keyword placement, stronger benefit statements, a call to action, and a metadata recommendation.

output_examples.input: Brief: write a 1,500 word guide for first-time project managers.
output_examples.output: A guide-style article plan and draft with practical examples, short paragraphs, semantic keywords, trust signals, summary points, and suggested FAQs.

best_practices: Provide the target audience, search intent, primary keyword, related terms, and desired word count.
Add source material or approved facts when the article needs accurate data, examples, or citations.
Review the draft for brand voice, factual accuracy, and compliance before publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for generic SEO content without a topic, audience, keyword, or goal.
Do not use generated statistics or expert claims without verification.
Do not force keywords into every paragraph when natural language would serve readers better.

faq.question: What does this skill produce?
faq.answer: It produces SEO content packages with outlines, drafts, title ideas, metadata, summaries, internal link ideas, and FAQs.

faq.question: Does it perform keyword research?
faq.answer: No. It works best when you provide target keywords, related terms, and search intent from your research process.

faq.question: Can it write full articles?
faq.answer: Yes. It can draft full articles when you provide a topic, audience, keyword, word count, and goals.

faq.question: Can it optimize existing content?
faq.answer: Yes. It can revise drafts for headings, readability, keyword placement, introductions, conclusions, and metadata.

faq.question: Does it guarantee search ranking results?
faq.answer: No. It follows SEO writing practices, but rankings depend on competition, authority, technical SEO, links, and content quality.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
